subcodes.first_line: O thou who art dear, and wise! Thy letter dated 27 May 1906 hath been received and its contents are most pleasing and have brought great joy. Thou didst ask whether this Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز دانا نامه ای که بتاریخ ۲۷ ماه می ۱۹۰۶ مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as mediator, @power of the Manifestation of God, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @oneness; unity of religion
